name: Military Doctrine
description: Strong defenses and rapid fortification. Your walls rise fast and your soldiers fight hard.
flavor_text: Strength through discipline. Safety through vigilance.

name: Trade Federation
description: Superior trading networks and gold generation. Buy low, sell high.
flavor_text: Every coin has two sides. We profit from both.

name: Academy of Knowledge
description: Rapid research and technological advancement. Knowledge is your shield.
flavor_text: In understanding lies power. In wisdom, survival.

name: Agrarian Society
description: Bountiful harvests and rapid farm expansion. Your people never go hungry.
flavor_text: The earth provides for those who tend it with care.
